subcodes.title: Words to a visitor, spoken on 1913-05-12
subcodes.first_line: By this is meant that Christ imbued the meanings of the ancient law with new life and invested them with a fresh effect
subcodes.first_line_orig: معانی شرع قدیم را حضرت مسیح نشئهٴ واثر جدید داد
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @Christ; Christianity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
